Vendored URDF source: ros-industrial/universal_robot
Upstream URL: https://github.com/ros-industrial/universal_robot
Upstream commit: f2f8613b357ef5a704b9befbbcb967fd024e9bd4
Upstream path: ur_description/urdf/ur5e.xacro (pre-expanded via the xacro toolchain)
Pre-expansion tool: xacro 2.1.1 (PyPI)
Pre-expansion command: ROS_PACKAGE_PATH=<upstream-checkout> xacro ur_description/urdf/ur5e.xacro
sha256 of vendored file: 90cdc556e5ebda6fc2099fd0e61f0380f3e4df95e76e8c34978002df0b0aec79
